# AfroTools full tool directory

> AfroTools provides practical AI routing, calculators, documents, country guides, data tools, and exports for African workflows.

AfroTools connects an AI routing layer to existing calculators, document builders, checklists, country pages, datasets, widgets, and exports. The AI layer helps select and prefill workflows; it does not replace the underlying tools, source checks, or professional judgment.

Many calculators and document workflows run in the browser. Data-driven pages show source, freshness, assumptions, confidence, or fallback status where available. Tax, legal, immigration, customs, medical, financial, and engineering outputs are planning aids and should be verified with the relevant authority or a qualified professional.

This file lists the generated English tool directory. The concise overview is available at [llms.txt](https://afrotools.com/llms.txt).

## Directory scope

- 1,252 canonical English tool records.
- 3,259 indexable tool destinations across published languages.
- Languages: English (EN), French (FR), Swahili (SW), Hausa (HA), Yoruba (YO).

## Agriculture

- [Agri-Input Price Comparator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/input-prices/): Compare fertilizer, seed, and agrochemical prices across brands and suppliers in 15 African countries. Compare value for your farm inputs.
- [Agricultural Export Docs Checklist](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/export-docs/): Country-specific checklist of every document needed to export agricultural items from any of Africa's 54 countries. Phytosanitary, export licence, AfCFTA CoO, customs, commodity board permits.
- [Algeria Crop Yield Estimator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/crop-yield/algeria): Estimate crop yields in Algeria with region-specific data, 40+ crops, FAOSTAT-backed.
- [Algeria Farm Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-profit/algeria): Calculate farm profitability in Algeria. Full cost analysis for wheat, barley, potato, olive.
- [Algeria Farm Worker Payroll Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-payroll/algeria): Calculate farm worker wages in Algeria. SNMG minimum wage, CNAS deductions, PAYE.
- [Algeria Fertilizer Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/fertilizer/algeria): Calculate NPK fertilizer needs for Algeria with local item recommendations and subsidy info.
- [Algeria Irrigation Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/irrigation/algeria): Calculate crop water requirements and irrigation schedules for Algeria. FAO Penman-Monteith method.
- [Algeria Seed Rate Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/seed-rate/algeria): Calculate seed rates for wheat, barley, potato in Algeria. Country-specific spacing, germination, and pricing.
- [Angola Agri-Input Price Comparator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/input-prices/angola): Compare fertilizer, seed, and agrochemical prices in Angola. MINAGRIP PNDR programme.
- [Angola Cassava Processing Profit](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/cassava-processing/angola): Cassava flour & chips profit calculator for Angola. AOA (Kwanza) prices, MINAGRI processing support.
- [Angola Crop Yield Estimator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/crop-yield/angola): Estimate crop yields in Angola with region-specific data, 40+ crops, FAOSTAT-backed.
- [Angola Farm Loan Eligibility Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-loans/angola): Check which Angolan agri-loan programs you qualify for — BDA development bank at 8-10%, PRODESI at 4-8%, BIC/BAI.
- [Angola Farm Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-profit/angola): Calculate farm profitability in Angola. Full cost analysis for cassava, maize, banana.
- [Angola Farm Worker Payroll Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-payroll/angola): Calculate farm worker wages in Angola. INSS deductions, cassava and coffee sector.
- [Angola Fertilizer Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/fertilizer/angola): Calculate NPK fertilizer needs for Angola with local item recommendations and subsidy info.
- [Angola Fish Farming ROI](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/fish-farming/angola): Tilapia & catfish ROI for Angola. MINAGRI program, Malanje & Huambo provinces.
- [Angola Greenhouse Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/greenhouse/angola): Greenhouse setup costs & ROI for Angola. AOA prices, PRODESI agri programme.
- [Angola Irrigation Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/irrigation/angola): Calculate crop water requirements and irrigation schedules for Angola. FAO Penman-Monteith method.
- [Angola Livestock Feed Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/livestock-feed/angola): Cattle, goat & sheep feed rations for Angola. AOA prices — maize, sorghum, cottonseed cake.
- [Angola Seed Rate Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/seed-rate/angola): Calculate seed rates for cassava, maize, banana in Angola. Country-specific spacing, germination, and pricing.

- [Tunisia Farm Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-profit/tunisia): Calculate farm profitability in Tunisia. Full cost analysis for olive, wheat, barley, citrus, dates.
- [Tunisia Farm Worker Payroll Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-payroll/tunisia): Calculate farm worker wages in Tunisia. Separate agricultural SMAG, CNSS deductions.
- [Tunisia Fertilizer Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/fertilizer/tunisia): Calculate NPK fertilizer needs for Tunisia with local item recommendations and subsidy info.
- [Tunisia Fish Farming ROI](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/fish-farming/tunisia): Tilapia & catfish ROI for Tunisia. Freshwater aquaculture with government subsidies.
- [Tunisia Greenhouse Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/greenhouse/tunisia): Greenhouse setup costs & ROI for Tunisia. TND prices, Cap Bon & Bizerte clusters.
- [Tunisia Irrigation Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/irrigation/tunisia): Calculate crop water requirements and irrigation schedules for Tunisia. FAO Penman-Monteith method.
- [Tunisia Livestock Feed Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/livestock-feed/tunisia): Cattle, goat & sheep feed rations for Tunisia. TND prices — barley, berseem clover, olive pulp.
- [Tunisia Seed Rate Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/seed-rate/tunisia): Calculate seed rates for wheat, barley, potato in Tunisia. Country-specific spacing, germination, and pricing.
- [Uganda Agri-Input Price Comparator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/input-prices/uganda): Compare fertilizer, seed, and agrochemical prices in Uganda. OWC/PDM programme.
- [Uganda Cassava Processing Profit](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/cassava-processing/uganda): HQCF & cassava chips profit calculator for Uganda. UGX prices, Kampala bakery market.
- [Uganda Crop Yield Estimator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/crop-yield/uganda): Estimate crop yields in Uganda with region-specific data, 40+ crops, FAOSTAT-backed.
- [Uganda Farm Loan Eligibility Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-loans/uganda): Check which Ugandan agri-loan programs you qualify for — UDB, DFCU AgriBusiness, Centenary Bank, SACCOs.
- [Uganda Farm Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-profit/uganda): Calculate farm profitability in Uganda. Full cost analysis for coffee, banana, maize, cassava, sweet potato.
- [Uganda Farm Worker Payroll Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-payroll/uganda): Calculate farm worker wages in Uganda. NSSF deductions, coffee and tea sector.
- [Uganda Fertilizer Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/fertilizer/uganda): Calculate NPK fertilizer needs for Uganda with local item recommendations and subsidy info.

- [Event Countdown Timer](https://afrotools.com/tools/countdown-timer/): Countdown to any date. African public holidays pre-loaded per country.
- [Meeting Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meeting-cost/): Real cost of a meeting based on salaries and duration. African FX rates.
- [Monthly Budget Planner](https://afrotools.com/tools/budget-planner/): 50/30/20 rule adapted for African income patterns and mobile money.
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://afrotools.com/tools/pomodoro/): Focus timer with African language motivational quotes. Works offline.
- [Random Name/Number Picker](https://afrotools.com/tools/random-picker/): Pick raffle winners, group divider, lucky dip. Ajo/Susu order generator.
- [Student Grade Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/grade-tracker/): Track CA and exam scores with Africa exam presets, risk flags, GPA, CGPA, and revision handoffs.
- [Tip & Bill Splitter](https://afrotools.com/tools/tip-calculator/): Split restaurant bills, calculate tips. Multi-currency. WhatsApp share.
- [Unit Converter (African)](https://afrotools.com/tools/unit-converter/): Convert units including African measurements: Nigerian plots, SA morgen, etc.
- [Working Days Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/working-days/): Count working days between dates, excluding public holidays per country.

Market rates by country, role, and industry. 25th/50th/75th percentile. Counter-offer range, negotiation script template, total comp calculator.

## Climate & Environment

- [Air Quality Index Tracker for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/air-quality/): Estimate AQI, PM2.5 exposure, mask guidance and health-cost proxy for African city, roadside, industrial, rural and indoor-smoke scenarios.
- [Carbon Credit Revenue for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/carbon-credit/): Estimate carbon credit revenue, buffer deductions, validation cost and MRV readiness for REDD+, reforestation, mangrove, soil, cookstove and methane projects.
- [Charcoal vs Clean Cooking for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/charcoal-vs-clean/): Compare charcoal against LPG, electric, biogas or ethanol cooking over time, including cost, smoke-risk and CO2-reduction proxy.
- [Deforestation Impact for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/deforestation/): Estimate CO2 released, lost future sequestration, restoration budget and land-conversion risk before clearing or restoring African forest land.
- [Drought Risk Assessment for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/drought-risk/): Estimate drought probability, crop loss, water deficit and mitigation actions for African farms using rainfall anomaly, crop, soil and irrigation inputs.
- [E-Waste Collection Value for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/ewaste-value/): Estimate e-waste payout, data-wipe priority, hazard risk and CO2 avoided for phones, laptops, TVs, batteries and mixed electronics.
- [Flood Risk Assessment for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/flood-risk/): Assess flood exposure, annual loss proxy, insurance budget and preparedness actions for African homes, shops and facilities.
- [Rainfall Pattern Tracker for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/rainfall-tracker/): Compare received rainfall against expected monthly patterns and get crop-stage irrigation, drainage and planting guidance.
- [Recycling Revenue for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/recycling-revenue/): Estimate monthly revenue, contamination loss, transport drag and CO2 avoided from plastic, metal, paper, glass and organics.
- [Sustainable Business Scorecard for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/sustainability-scorecard/): Score an African business across energy, waste, water, sourcing, worker safety and disclosure readiness with a 90-day action plan.
- [Tree Planting ROI for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/tree-planting-roi/): Estimate 25-year tree planting value with survival rate, carbon price, produce or timber value, maintenance and carbon verification route.
- [Waste Management Cost for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/waste-management/): Estimate monthly waste collection cost, diversion potential, circularity score and operational fixes for African shops, clinics, schools and facilities.
- [Water Scarcity Calculator for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/water-scarcity/): Estimate shortage days, storage needs, daily demand and water-stress risk for African homes, clinics, schools, farms and businesses.

## Developer Tools

- [.htaccess Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/htaccess-gen/): Generate .htaccess rules for redirects, password protection, caching.
- [African API Directory — Fintech, Gov, Telecom APIs](https://afrotools.com/tools/african-api-directory/): Searchable directory of African APIs: Paystack, Flutterwave, M-Pesa, Africa
- [African Domain Checker — .ng .ke .za .gh TLDs Guide](https://afrotools.com/tools/african-domains/): Check pricing, registrar and requirements for African country-code domains: .ng, .ke, .za, .gh, .et, .tz, .rw, .cm, .sn, .ma, .eg and more.
- [API Tester (Postman Lite)](https://afrotools.com/tools/api-tester/): REST API testing in-browser. No install needed. Pre-built Africa fintech collections.
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://afrotools.com/tools/base64/): Encode/decode text and files. Image-to-Base64, URL-safe mode, live encoding, stats bar. AI assist.
- [Commit Message Generator — Conventional Commits](https://afrotools.com/tools/commit-message-gen/): Generate conventional commit messages instantly. Select type (feat/fix/docs), add scope, write description. Validates 72-char limit, gitmoji support, copy with one click.
- [Cron Expression Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/cron-builder/): Build cron schedules with timezone previews, next runs, platform warnings and snippets for Linux, GitHub, Kubernetes and AWS.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/css-gradient/): Visual linear/radial/conic gradient builder. Copy CSS instantly.
- [Data Format Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/data-converter/): Convert between JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, TOML, TSV. Auto-detect, SQL INSERT generator, preview table.
- [Developer Tools for Africa — JSON, Regex, JWT, Hash, UUID](https://afrotools.com/tools/dev-tools/): Free developer tools: JSON/CSV/XML converter, hash generator, Base64 encoder, regex tester, JWT decoder, UUID generator, diff checker, markdown editor, cron builder. All client-side.
- [Docker Compose Generator — African Developer Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/docker-compose-gen/): Generate docker-compose.yml files with common service templates: Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, Nginx, React. Includes .env template and deploy notes.
- [Hash Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/hash-generator/): MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, SHA-3, HMAC, CRC32. All-at-once grid, checksum verify, file hashing.
- [Hosting Cost Comparator for African Developers](https://afrotools.com/tools/hosting-compare/): Compare hosting with source-checked pricing, local payment fit, ops effort, traffic estimates and risk notes.
- [HTML Entity Encoder](https://afrotools.com/tools/html-entities/): Encode/decode HTML entities and escape special characters.
- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://afrotools.com/tools/json-formatter/): Format, validate, repair, query and diff JSON or NDJSON. Includes schema, TypeScript and API Tester snippets.
- [JWT Decoder](https://afrotools.com/tools/jwt-decoder/): Decode JWTs locally, inspect claims, review JOSE risks, verify HS signatures and generate short-lived HS256 dev tokens.
- [Markdown Editor](https://afrotools.com/tools/markdown-editor/): Live preview, GFM tables, toolbar, scroll sync, fullscreen, word count, export to HTML/MD. AI assist.
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meta-tag-gen/): Generate SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags.
- [Password Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/password-generator/): Strong password generator. No server. Entropy meter included.
- [PWA Manifest Generator — Web App Manifest for African Devs](https://afrotools.com/tools/pwa-manifest/): Generate a detailed Web App Manifest (manifest.webmanifest) for your PWA. Includes icons checklist, service worker snippet and HTML meta tags.
- [Regex Tester](https://afrotools.com/tools/regex-tester/): Test regex with live matches, groups, replace preview, code snippets, ReDoS warnings and African validation presets.
- [Robots.txt Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/robots-txt/): Visual robots.txt builder. Validate and test against Googlebot rules.
- [SEO Meta Tag Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meta-tag-generator/): Generate optimised title, description, og tags and JSON-LD for African businesses.
- [Sitemap Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/sitemap-gen/): Generate XML sitemaps for small sites. Manual or URL-import mode.
- [SQL Formatter & Validator](https://afrotools.com/tools/sql-formatter/): Format, beautify and validate SQL queries. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite.
- [SQL Playground](https://afrotools.com/tools/sql-playground/): SQLite in-browser. Practice SQL without any installation.
- [Text/Code Diff Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/diff-checker/): Compare two blocks of text or code and highlight differences.
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](https://afrotools.com/tools/url-encoder/): Parse, encode, clean and rebuild URLs with query surgery, tracking cleanup, diagnostics and API request snippets.
- [USSD Code Simulator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ussd-simulator/): Visual USSD menu builder for African fintech developers.
- [USSD Flow Builder — Visual USSD Menu Designer](https://afrotools.com/tools/ussd-flow-builder/): Build USSD menus visually. Add menu items, sub-menus, input fields. Preview on a simulated phone. Generate Africa
- [UUID Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/uuid-generator/): Generate UUID v7, UUID v4, ULID and NanoID-style IDs with anatomy, collision math, exports and database snippets.
- [WCAG Contrast Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/color-contrast/): Check text/background contrast ratios for accessibility compliance.

## Diaspora

- [Immigration Points Calculator — Canada CRS, Australia Points, UK Skilled Worker](https://afrotools.com/tools/immigration-points/): Calculate your Canada Express Entry CRS score, Australia points test score, or check UK Skilled Worker visa eligibility. Compare against current draw cutoffs. Free for Africans.
- [Visa Application Tracker — UK, Canada, Australia, USA, UAE](https://afrotools.com/tools/visa-tracker/): Track your visa application status, days elapsed, estimated completion date, and documents checklist for UK, Canada, Australia, USA, UAE, and Schengen visas from Africa.

## Document & PDF

- [AI Chat with PDF](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-chat/): Ask PDFs questions, summarize, search pages, cite sources, copy or download transcripts, with local fallback.
- [Business Plan Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-plan/): Build lender-ready plans with templates, forecasts, funding gap, readiness review and PDF, DOC, CSV export.
- [Cover Letter Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/cover-letter-generator/): Africa-first cover letters with JD matching, readiness score, optional AI Assist, local drafts and private export.
- [CV / Resume Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/cv-builder/): Africa-ready templates. NYSC/NSS/KCSE aware. Premium templates.
- [Document & PDF Tools for Africa](https://afrotools.com/document-pdf/): Merge, split, compress, watermark, password-protect PDFs. Convert between formats. All browser-based — files never leave your device.
- [Freelance Invoice Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/freelance-invoice/): Create freelance invoices, estimates, and receipts with taxes, payment links, saved clients, QR codes, reminders, and PDF, DOC, CSV export.
- [HTML to PDF Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/html-to-pdf/): Convert HTML or rich text to PDF with templates, custom CSS, headers, footers, page numbers, and preview.
- [Invoice Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/invoice-generator/): Create African invoices with VAT, payment details, balance due, saved clients/items, share links and PDF export.
- [Meeting Minutes Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/meeting-minutes/): Create agenda-led minutes with decisions, action owners, due dates, saved drafts and PDF, CSV, ICS export.
- [PDF ↔ Image Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-image-convert/): Convert PDF pages or extract embedded images to PNG, JPG, or WebP with page ranges and ZIP export, or combine ordered images into PDFs with page size, orientation, margin, fit, and quality controls. Browser-only processing.
- [PDF Bates Numbering](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-bates/): Batch Bates stamp PDFs with continuous numbering, page ranges, audit logs, and ZIP export.
- [PDF Compare Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-compare/): Compare PDFs locally with text diff, visual overlay, changed-page map, and review report export.
- [PDF Compressor](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-compress/): Compress PDFs with clean, balanced, strong, custom target-size, and batch ZIP modes. Browser-only processing.
- [PDF Editor](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-editor/): Edit PDFs locally with text, images, signatures, stamps, shapes, highlights, whiteout, drawing, undo, preview, and flattened export.
- [PDF eSignature Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-sign/): Draw, type, or upload signature. Sign PDFs in-browser. No account needed.
- [PDF Find & Replace](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-find-replace/): Find and visually replace PDF text with page ranges, regex search, preview, undo, and CSV audit export.
- [PDF Form Filler](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-form-filler/): Fill PDF form fields (AcroForms) in-browser. Load PDF, detect fields, fill, and save.
- [PDF Format Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-convert/): Convert DOCX, XLSX, XLS, CSV, selectable PDF text, and PDF pages to PNG/JPG ZIP in the browser.
- [PDF Header & Footer](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-header-footer/): Add six-zone headers, footers, page numbers, dates, Bates labels, page ranges, preview, and batch ZIP export. Browser-only processing.
- [PDF Merge & Split](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-merge-split/): Merge, reorder, choose page ranges, split by ranges, extract selected pages, or export every page as a ZIP. Browser-only processing.
- [PDF OCR — Text Extraction](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-ocr/): Extract text from scanned PDFs and images using Tesseract.js OCR. Runs 100% in browser.
- [PDF Page Manager](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-reorder/): Reorder, rotate, delete, duplicate, insert, reverse, range-select, and extract PDF pages locally with thumbnails.
- [PDF Page Numbering](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-page-numbers/): Add page numbers with ranges, start page, templates, fonts, color, margins, preview, facing-page mode, and batch ZIP export. Browser-only processing.
- [PDF Password Protect](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-password/): Protect PDFs with AES-256 passwords, owner permissions, strength checks, unlock mode, and batch ZIP output. Runs locally with QPDF WebAssembly.
- [PDF Redaction Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-redact/): Search, mark, preview, and securely flatten PDF redactions in your browser.
- [PDF Repair Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-repair/): Repair damaged PDFs with qpdf rebuild, fallback salvage, diagnostics, reports, and batch ZIP export.
- [PDF to Audio Reader](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-to-audio/): Listen to PDFs with ranked local voices, optional AI voices, bookmarks, cleanup filters, and audio export.
- [PDF Translator](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-translate/): Translate PDFs with API, AI, local African-language glossary drafts, review packs, and bilingual exports.
- [PDF Watermark Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-watermark/): Add text or image watermarks to one PDF or batches with page ranges, opacity, rotation, tiling, 3x3 placement, over/under layer modes, preview, and ZIP export. Browser-only processing.
- [PDF Workflow Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-workflow/): Build reusable PDF recipes: repair, optimize, keep pages, merge, watermark, page numbers, flatten, and AES password protection with downloadable reports.
- [PDF Workspace](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-workspace/): Split, merge, rearrange, rotate, compress, add page numbers. Files never leave your browser.
- [Receipt Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/receipt-generator/): Create VAT-ready receipts with payment references, QR codes, saved drafts and PDF, CSV, JSON export.

## Energy & Utilities

- [Appliance Power Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/appliance-power/): Calculate electricity consumption for all home appliances in Africa. Find your biggest energy consumers and monthly bill breakdown.
- [Backup Duration Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/backup-duration/): Calculate how long your inverter/UPS backup will last. Battery capacity, load wattage, efficiency factor.
- [Battery & Inverter Sizing](https://afrotools.com/tools/battery-sizing/): Calculate battery bank and inverter requirements for off-grid and backup power in Africa. Lithium vs lead-acid comparison.
- [Biogas Digester ROI](https://afrotools.com/tools/biogas-roi/): Calculate biogas digester return on investment for African farms and households. Feedstock, gas yield, cooking hours saved.
- [Carbon Footprint (Energy)](https://afrotools.com/tools/carbon-footprint-energy/): Calculate household and business carbon footprint from energy use in Africa. Grid electricity, generator, LPG emissions.
- [Diesel vs Solar Farm](https://afrotools.com/tools/diesel-vs-solar-farm/): Compare diesel generator vs solar farm economics for agribusiness. 10-year TCO, fuel risk, carbon credits.
- [Electricity Bill Verifier](https://afrotools.com/tools/electricity-bill-verify/): Check meter readings against expected tariff charges. Spot overbilling, estimated readings, and unusual variance.
- [Electricity Tariff Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/electricity-tariff/): Estimate electricity bills for supported African countries. Residential, commercial, industrial, and tiered tariff bands where available.
- [EV Charging Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ev-charging/): Calculate EV charging costs across Africa. Home, public charging stations, cost vs petrol comparison. Current EV landscape.
- [Gas / LPG Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/gas-lpg-cost/): Calculate LPG cooking gas costs for African households. Price per kg, cylinder size comparison, gas vs electricity cost.
- [Generator Fuel Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/generator-fuel/): Calculate generator fuel cost across 15 African markets. Daily litres, monthly spend, maintenance, and cost per kWh.
- [Home Energy Audit](https://afrotools.com/tools/energy-audit/): Audit your home energy consumption and get an efficiency score. Appliance-by-appliance breakdown with savings recommendations.
- [Mini-Grid Feasibility Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/mini-grid-feasibility/): Assess mini-grid viability for rural African communities. Population, demand, solar resource, duty modelling.
- [Outage Cost (Business)](https://afrotools.com/tools/outage-cost/): Calculate the financial cost of power outages for African businesses. Generator hours, lost itemivity, spoilage — monthly impact.
- [PayGo Solar Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/paygo-solar/): Compare PayGo solar plans (M-KOPA, d.light, Zola) vs upfront purchase. Total cost, daily payment, asset ownership timeline.
- [Prepaid Meter Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/prepaid-meter/): Estimate prepaid electricity units in any African country. Token amount, service charges, account type, and days of supply.
- [Solar Panel ROI Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/solar-roi/): Compare solar, battery, generator, outage loss, financing, maintenance, payback, and affordability risk.
- [Solar Sizing Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/solar-sizing/): Size a solar system for your African home or business. Panel wattage, battery capacity, inverter size — load-based recommendations.
- [Solar vs Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/solar-vs-generator/): Compare solar and generator total ownership across top African energy markets. Fuel, maintenance, battery, and payback.
- [Water Bill Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/water-bill/): Estimate water bills and per-person daily usage. Compare residential and commercial tariffs across top African markets.

- [Paint Coverage Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/paint-calculator/): Litres needed per room. Local brands: Dulux, Crown, Berger Africa.
- [Plumbing Material Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/plumbing-material/): Calculate pipes, fittings and fixtures for residential plumbing. PVC, PPR, copper options with Nigerian and Kenyan supplier prices.
- [Rebar Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/rebar-calculator/): Bar bending schedule, cutting lengths, lap lengths, weight and cost. Y8 to Y32 bars with African steel prices.
- [Renovation Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/home-renovation-cost/): Estimate kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, roof renovation costs in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana. Room-by-room breakdown with local prices.
- [Road Construction Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/road-construction-cost/): Estimate road construction cost per km. Paved, gravel, bitumen macadam for African terrain and local contractors.
- [Roofing Material Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/roof-calculator/): Iron sheets, tiles, or shingles per square metre. Per-country price estimates.
- [Scaffolding Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/scaffolding-calc/): Calculate scaffolding material quantities and hire cost for African construction projects. Frame, ringlock and cuplock systems.
- [Septic Tank Size Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/septic-tank/): Calculate septic tank dimensions based on household size, usage and soil type. African soil conditions and local standards.
- [Site Clearing Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/site-clearing/): Estimate land clearance, excavation and levelling costs per hectare or plot. African labour rates and equipment hire.
- [Solar Panel Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/solar-calculator/): Size your solar system with African irradiance data. Battery bank, inverter sizing, and 10-year ROI vs generator.
- [Structural Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/structural-calc/): KEBS/SABS/SON building code calculations. Premium professional reports.
- [Swimming Pool Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/swimming-pool-cost/): Estimate pool construction cost in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa. Tiled, vinyl and fibreglass options with landscaping and filtration.
- [Tiles & Flooring Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tiles-calc/): Number of tiles needed per room with wastage factor. Local tile brands.
- [Water Tank Sizing Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/water-tank/): Household water storage needs per day. Common tank brands and sizes.

- [CBK Exchange Rates — Kenya Shilling Today](https://afrotools.com/tools/cbk-rates/): Live mid-market KES rates for USD, EUR, GBP and regional currencies, with how CBK indicative rates work.

- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/compound-interest/): Calculate compound interest on savings and investments in Africa. Daily, monthly, or annual compounding. Supports NGN, KES, ZAR, GHS and 8 more.
- [Côte d'Ivoire PAYE](https://afrotools.com/cote-divoire/ci-paye): DGI taux progressif, CNPS cotisations. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Crypto Knowledge Quiz](https://afrotools.com/crypto/quiz/): 3 difficulty levels, Africa-specific questions. Test your crypto knowledge, share your score.
- [Crypto Portfolio Tracker](https://afrotools.com/crypto/portfolio/): Track holdings in Naira, Shilling, Rand. Live value, P/L, allocation charts, 50-coin limit.
- [Crypto Prices](https://afrotools.com/crypto/prices/): Latest available prices for 50+ coins in Naira, Shilling, Rand, Cedi and 15+ African currencies.
- [Crypto Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/profit-calculator/): Quick P/L calculator. Enter buy price, get profit, ROI, break-even. What-if price slider.
- [Crypto Remittance Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/remittance/): Compare crypto vs Wise vs Western Union for sending money to Africa. See real savings.
- [Crypto Scam Checker](https://afrotools.com/crypto/scam-checker/): Report and search crypto scams. Red flags checklist, scam database, community reports.
- [Crypto Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/crypto-tax/): CGT on crypto for NG, KE, ZA, GH. NTA 2026 digital asset rules.
- [Crypto Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/tax-calculator/): Calculate crypto capital gains tax for Nigeria, South Africa, Kenya, Ghana, Egypt. CSV import.
- [DCA Calculator](https://afrotools.com/crypto/dca-calculator/): Backtest dollar cost averaging. See what N50k/week in BTC for 2 years would be worth today.
- [Djibouti PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/djibouti/dj-paye): Direction des Impôts IRPP + social security. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [DR Congo PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/dr-congo/cd-paye): DGI IPR progressif + INSS. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Egypt Income Tax](https://afrotools.com/egypt/eg-paye): ETA progressive rates (0%–27.5%), EGP 20,000 exemption, NOSI, bracket exclusion rule. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Employee Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/staff-cost/): Total cost of hiring: salary, PAYE, pension, NHIS, NHF, bonuses.
- [Equatorial Guinea PAYE](https://afrotools.com/eq-guinea/gq-paye): IRPF bands + social security. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Eritrea PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/eritrea/er-paye): MoF income tax progressive bands. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Eswatini PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/eswatini/sz-paye): SRA tax bands + SNPF. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Ethiopia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/ethiopia/et-paye): ERCA 7-band PAYE (0%–35%), pension 7%+11%, ETB 15k cap. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Exchange Trust Scores](https://afrotools.com/crypto/exchange-ratings/): 8 African-serving exchanges rated on security, fees, support, fiat options. User reviews.
- [FIRE Calculator for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/retirement-planner/): Financial Independence calculator. Lean/Fat/Coast/Barista FIRE. Interactive savings slider, local investment vehicles, high-inflation adjustment. AI advisor.
- [First Home Buyer Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/first-home-buyer/): Plan your first home purchase in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa or Ghana. Savings timeline, affordability, first-buyer grants and schemes.
- [Forex Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/forex-profit/): Calculate pips, lot size, leverage, and profit for African forex traders.
- [Gabon PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/gabon/ga-paye): DGI taux progressif + CNSS. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Gambia PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/gambia/gm-paye): GRA tax bands + SSHFC. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Ghana PAYE + SSNIT](https://afrotools.com/ghana/gh-paye): GRA 2025 7-band tax, SSNIT Tier I/II/III, all personal reliefs. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Ghana SSNIT Benefits Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/gh-ssnit/): SSNIT pension benefits, replacement rate and survival benefits.
- [Ghana Withholding Tax Calc](https://afrotools.com/tools/gh-wht/): GRA WHT rates on dividends, rents, professional fees, contracts.
- [Guinea PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/guinea/gn-paye): DNI impôt + CNSS. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Guinea-Bissau PAYE](https://afrotools.com/guinea-bissau/gw-paye): DGCI imposto sobre rendimento + INSS. PDF export + optional AI assist.
- [Home Loan Eligibility Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/home-loan-eligibility/): Check if you qualify for a home loan in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa or Ghana. Real African bank criteria, instant pre-qualification score.
- [Import Duty Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/import-duty/): Planning import duty and landed-cost estimate with source-confidence labels for rates, levies, FX, and user-entered values. 17 African countries.
- [Investment Return Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/investment-return/): Simple/compound interest, CAGR. African market returns benchmark.
- [Job Offer Evaluator](https://afrotools.com/tools/job-offer-evaluator/): Compare two job offers on salary, benefits, cost of living, and career growth potential.
- [Kenya CGT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-cgt/): KRA CGT 15% on property and shares. Exemptions and rollover relief.
- [Kenya NSSF Benefits Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-nssf/): NSSF tier benefits and projected pension payout.
- [Kenya PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/kenya/ke-paye): KRA 5-band PAYE, NSSF Tier I/II, SHIF 2.75%, AHL 1.5%. Tax Laws Amendment Act 2024.
- [Kenya Stamp Tariff Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-stamp-duty/): KRA stamp duty on property transfer and lease agreements.
- [Kenya WHT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ke-wht/): KRA withholding tax rates on various income types.
- [KRA eTIMS Guide — Onboarding & Invoices](https://afrotools.com/tools/etims-guide/): Who must issue electronic tax invoices in Kenya, eTIMS Lite vs Client vs VSCU/OSCU, and why expenses need eTIMS invoices.

## Fintech & Banking

- [Asset Finance Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/asset-finance/): Calculate asset finance costs for vehicles, equipment, and machinery across Africa. Monthly installments, total cost, balloon payment options, and effective rate.
- [Bill Split Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/bill-split/): Split bills fairly with friends, colleagues, or groups in any African currency. Equal split, percentage split, or custom amounts with tip calculator.
- [BNPL Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/bnpl-calc/): Calculate true cost of Buy Now Pay Later schemes in Africa. Carbon Zero, CredPal, M-Kopa, PayFlex — hidden fees revealed.
- [Credit Score Explainer & Simulator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/credit-score/): Understand and simulate your African credit score (CRB Kenya, TransUnion SA, CRC Nigeria). See what factors affect your score and how to improve it.
- [Cross-Border B2B Payment Comparator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/b2b-payment/): Compare cross-border B2B payment options for African businesses. SWIFT, Flutterwave, Chipper Cash, Nala, Wise Business — find the cheapest international transfer.
- [Debt Snowball / Avalanche Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/debt-snowball/): Pay off multiple debts faster. Compare Debt Snowball (smallest balance first) vs Debt Avalanche (highest rate first) — see which saves more money and time.
- [Digital Lending App Rates](https://afrotools.com/tools/digital-lending/): Compare digital lending apps (Fuliza, FairMoney, Carbon, PalmCredit) — true APR, fees, repayment periods.
- [Dividend Yield Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/dividend-yield/): Calculate dividend yield, payout ratio, and income from shareholdings. Compare dividend yield against inflation and fixed deposit rates in Africa.
- [Dollar-Cost Averaging Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/dca-calc/): Model dollar-cost averaging (DCA) investing: monthly contributions over time, average cost per unit, and portfolio value at various return scenarios.
- [Emergency Fund Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/emergency-fund/): Calculate ideal emergency fund size for African households. 3-6 months expenses, cost of living by country.
- [FIRE Calculator — Financial Independence in Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/fire-calc/): African-context FIRE calculator. Calculate your FIRE number, years to financial independence, monthly savings needed, and safe withdrawal rate.
- [Fixed Deposit Rate Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/fixed-deposit/): Compare fixed deposit and savings account interest rates across African banks. 30/60/90/180/365-day tenors, 20+ banks.
- [Government Bond Yield Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/bond-yield/): Calculate yield-to-maturity, current yield, and price for African government bonds. Compare bond vs T-bill returns across 15 African countries.
- [Investment Property vs Stocks Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/property-vs-stocks/): Compare investment property vs stock market investing in Africa. ROI, liquidity, risk, and 10-year wealth projection to help you decide where to put your money.
- [Invoice Factoring Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/invoice-factoring/): Calculate invoice factoring costs across Africa. Advance amount, factoring fee, net proceeds, and effective APR for receivables financing.
- [Loan Consolidation Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/loan-consolidation/): Should you consolidate your loans? Compare keeping multiple loans vs one consolidation loan — savings, break-even point, and new monthly payment.
- [Loan Shark vs Bank Rate](https://afrotools.com/tools/loan-shark-compare/): Compare informal moneylender rates vs bank loans vs fintech apps. True APR calculator showing hidden cost of predatory lending.
- [Merchant Fee Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/merchant-fees/): Calculate total merchant payment acceptance costs across Africa. Card fees, mobile money, bank transfer — find your true cost of accepting payments.
- [Microfinance Loan Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/microfinance-loan/): Calculate microfinance loan repayments for African MFIs. Flat vs reducing balance, group vs individual loans.
- [Mobile Money vs Bank Transfer](https://afrotools.com/tools/mobile-vs-bank/): Compare M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, Airtel Money vs bank transfer fees for domestic and cross-border payments across Africa.
- [Money Market Fund Comparator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/money-market/): Compare money market fund yields vs fixed deposits across Africa. See daily accrual, 7-day yield, and effective annual return for top African MMFs.
- [Net Worth Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/net-worth/): Calculate your net worth: total assets minus total liabilities. Track savings, investments, property, vehicles, and debts in your local African currency.
- [Payment Gateway Fee Compare](https://afrotools.com/tools/payment-gateway/): Compare Paystack, Flutterwave, Stripe, DPO, Peach Payments transaction fees for African merchants.
- [POS Transaction Fee Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/pos-fees/): Calculate POS terminal transaction fees across Africa. Compare card machine fees, MDR rates, and monthly costs for retail merchants.
- [QR Payment Cost Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/qr-payment/): Calculate QR payment processing costs for merchants across Africa. Compare QR code payment fees vs POS, cash, and mobile money.
- [Real Return After Inflation](https://afrotools.com/tools/real-return/): Calculate real investment returns after inflation for all African countries. Bank deposits, T-bills, stocks, property.
- [SACCO/Credit Union Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/sacco-calc/): Calculate SACCO loan eligibility, dividend projections, and savings growth. Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda SACCOs.
- [Stock Portfolio Tracker — African Stock Exchanges](https://afrotools.com/tools/stock-portfolio/): Track your African stock portfolio across NSE Nigeria, JSE South Africa, GSE Ghana, NSE Kenya. Enter holdings to see total value, gain/loss, and allocation breakdown.
- [Thrift / Cooperative Returns Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/thrift-calc/): Calculate returns from African thrift societies, cooperatives, and rotating savings (Ajo/Esusu/Susu/Tontine). Compare vs commercial bank savings.
- [Trade Credit Terms Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/trade-credit/): Calculate trade credit costs and early payment discount savings across Africa. Net terms, 2/10 net 30, effective APR, and cash flow impact.
- [Treasury Bill Yield Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tbill-calc/): Calculate T-bill yields for Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, South Africa, Egypt. Annualised returns, tax treatment, minimum investment.

## Government & Civic

- [Africa Election Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/africa-election-tracker/): Track African presidential, governorship and local election dates with source confidence and official links.
- [African Visa Requirement Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/visa-checker/): Check visa requirements between any two African countries. Visa-free, visa on arrival, e-visa or visa required — with processing times and fees.
- [Birth & Death Certificate Guide](https://afrotools.com/tools/birth-death-cert/): Practical guide to registering births and deaths in Africa. Authority, required documents, fees, and late registration rules for supported countries.
- [FOI Request Template Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/foi-template/): Generate a Freedom of Information request letter for Nigeria (FOIA 2011), South Africa (PAIA), Kenya (ATI Act), or Ghana (RTI Act).
- [Government Budget Comparator (YoY)](https://afrotools.com/tools/budget-comparator/): Compare government budget allocations year-on-year for Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa and Ghana. Education, health, defence, infrastructure — per capita.
- [Government Scholarship Finder](https://afrotools.com/tools/gov-scholarship/): Find government scholarships available in your country. Filter by level, field, local vs international. Includes NSFAS, PTDF, HELB bursaries, GETFUND and more.
- [Kenya Data Protection Act 2019 Compliance Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/kenya-dpa/): Free Kenya DPA 2019 compliance checker. 18 questions covering ODPC registration, lawful basis, data subject rights, DPO obligations, breach notification, and cross-border transfer rules.
- [Land Registry Fee Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/land-registry-fees/): Estimate key fees to register or transfer land in Africa. Stamp duty, registration fees, conveyancing, and governor's consent where applicable.
- [Marriage Certificate Guide](https://afrotools.com/tools/marriage-cert/): How to get legally married and obtain a marriage certificate in Africa. Statutory, customary, and Islamic marriage registration requirements by country.
- [National ID Registration Guide](https://afrotools.com/tools/national-id-guide/): Step-by-step national ID registration guide for supported African countries. Requirements, fees, portal links, and common uses.
- [National Pension Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/national-pension/): Project your government pension fund at retirement. Uses your country's official contribution rates (PenCom, NSSF, SSNIT, GEPF etc.) and compound growth.
- [Passport Application Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/passport-checklist/): Step-by-step passport application guide with fee breakdown for 9+ African countries. Documents checklist, processing times, official portals.
- [Social Welfare Eligibility Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/social-welfare/): Check which social protection programs you qualify for. Nigeria CCT/N-Power, Kenya Inua Jamii, South Africa SASSA grants, Ghana LEAP — income-tested.
- [Voter Registration Guide](https://afrotools.com/tools/voter-registration/): How to register to vote in your African country. Electoral commission details, eligibility checker, registration steps, and next election dates.
- [Work Permit Cost Guide — All 54 African Countries](https://afrotools.com/tools/work-permit-cost/): Free Work Permit Cost Guide for supported African countries. Select your country to calculate with local rates and data.

## Health & Wellness

- [African Child Vaccine Schedule](https://afrotools.com/tools/vaccine-schedule/): WHO and country-specific immunisation schedules for NG, KE, GH, ZA, ET.
- [African Food Calorie Counter](https://afrotools.com/tools/calorie-counter/): Calories and macros for 200+ African dishes. Jollof rice, egusi soup, ugali, injera, pounded yam, amala, fufu. Track daily intake.
- [African Hospital Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/hospital-cost/): Estimate surgery, maternity, and treatment costs at major hospitals in 10 countries.
- [African Meal Plan Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/african-meal-plan/): Generate a personalized 7-day meal plan using African foods. Choose region (West/East/Southern/North Africa), health goal, and dietary restrictions.
- [Blood Group Compatibility Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/blood-group/): Check blood transfusion compatibility (donor/recipient) and pregnancy Rh incompatibility. Includes African blood group frequency data and donation facts.
- [Blood Pressure Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/blood-pressure/): Log and analyse BP readings over time. Hypertension risk assessment for Africans.
- [BMI Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/bmi-calculator/): Advanced BMI calculator with body fat %, macro targets, goal timeline, waist-to-hip ratio, and health risk assessment.
- [BMI Calculator for Africans](https://afrotools.com/health/bmi-calculator/): BMI with African body composition research. Metric & imperial, waist-to-height ratio, ethnicity-adjusted context.
- [Breastfeeding Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/breastfeeding-tracker/): Track feeding sessions, duration, and side. WHO recommends exclusive breastfeeding for 6 months. African-specific support resources included.
- [C-Section vs Natural Birth Cost](https://afrotools.com/tools/csection-vs-natural/): Side-by-side cost and recovery comparison between C-section and natural birth across 4 African countries. Includes WHO recommendations on C-section rates.
- [Calorie Counter (African Foods)](https://afrotools.com/health/calorie-counter/): 200+ African foods with reviewed nutritional estimates. Build meals, track daily calories and macros with local dishes.
- [Child Growth Chart (WHO + African Context)](https://afrotools.com/tools/child-growth/): Track your child's growth against WHO standards. Calculate weight-for-age, height-for-age, and weight-for-height Z-scores. Stunting and wasting assessment.
- [Childbirth Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/childbirth-cost/): Compare delivery costs across public hospitals, private clinics, and premium facilities in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana, Tanzania and Rwanda. Includes ANC and insurance coverage.
- [Cholera Risk Assessment Tool](https://afrotools.com/tools/cholera-risk/): Assess cholera risk factors in your area. Prevention checklist, oral rehydration therapy guide, nearest treatment center finder for 15 African countries.
- [Clinic Costs](https://afrotools.com/tools/clinic-costs/): Track reviewed consultation, scan, treatment, and admission cost reports by city with moderated AfroPoints submissions.
- [Dental Procedure Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/dental-cost/): Estimate dental costs in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, and Ghana. Extractions, fillings, root canals, crowns, implants — public vs private clinic prices.
- [Diabetes Risk Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/diabetes-risk/): Type 2 diabetes risk score based on BMI, diet, family history for African populations.
- [Drug/Medicine Price Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/drug-price-compare/): Compare brand vs generic medicine prices across African countries. See savings on antimalarials, antibiotics, diabetes, hypertension and HIV medications.
- [Ebola Preparedness Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/ebola-checklist/): Ebola awareness and preparedness checklist for health workers and communities in at-risk African regions. WHO protocol reference.
- [Eye Care Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/eye-care-cost/): Estimate eye care costs in Africa. Consultations, glasses, contact lenses, cataract surgery — public vs private prices across major African countries.
- [Genotype Compatibility Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/genotype-checker/): Full pre-marriage genotype and blood group compatibility check. Sickle cell Punnett square, Rh factor incompatibility, blood transfusion compatibility — for African families.
- [Gym Membership Cost Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/gym-cost-compare/): Compare gym membership prices in Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana and other African cities. Monthly, quarterly, annual — home workout vs gym cost.
- [Hepatitis B Screening Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/hep-b-screening/): Estimate Hepatitis B screening and vaccination costs across 15 African countries. Africa has the world's highest HBV burden — know your numbers.
- [HIV/AIDS Treatment Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/hiv-treatment-cost/): Estimate HIV treatment costs in Africa. ARV access by country, what government programs cover, out-of-pocket costs for those without coverage.
- [Home Workout Calorie Burner](https://afrotools.com/tools/home-workout/): Calculate calories burned from home workouts and common African physical activities. No gym required — dancing, farming, hawking included.
- [Malaria Risk by Region](https://afrotools.com/tools/malaria-risk/): Malaria transmission risk map by African region and season.
- [Maternal Mortality Risk Assessment](https://afrotools.com/tools/maternal-mortality/): Awareness tool showing maternal mortality rates across Africa. Enter risk factors to understand relative risk and get evidence-based recommendations for safe delivery.
- [Medical Report Interpreter](https://afrotools.com/tools/medical-report/): Upload or paste lab results and get plain-English explanations for CBC, lipid, liver, kidney, thyroid, and diabetes markers. Uses a 60+ biomarker reference database.
- [Medical Tourism Cost Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/medical-tourism/): Compare medical procedure costs for treatment in India vs South Africa vs Egypt vs Turkey vs local. Includes travel, accommodation, and procedure costs.
- [Medication Dosage Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/drug-dosage/): Weight-based dosage for common drugs. Antimalarial, ARV, antibiotics.
- [Mental Health Service Cost Finder](https://afrotools.com/tools/mental-health-cost/): Find and estimate mental health service costs in Africa. Therapy, psychiatry, medication — with NHS/HMO coverage breakdown by country.
- [Ovulation & Fertility Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ovulation-calc/): Cycle tracking and fertile window. Swahili, Hausa, Amharic UI.
- [Pharmacy Prices](https://afrotools.com/tools/pharmacy-prices/): Track reviewed medicine price reports by city, dosage, and pack size across African pharmacies.
- [Pregnancy Due Date Calculator](https://afrotools.com/health/pregnancy-due-date/): Due date, weekly milestones, and hospital delivery cost estimates for Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana.
- [Pregnancy Due Date Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/due-date/): Pregnancy due date calculator with gestational weeks, trimester tips, development milestones, and African health guidelines.
- [Pregnancy Nutrition Calculator (African Diet)](https://afrotools.com/tools/pregnancy-nutrition/): Calculate nutritional needs during pregnancy using African foods. Daily calorie, iron, folic acid, and protein targets — with meal suggestions using local foods.
- [Sickle Cell Genotype Advisor](https://afrotools.com/tools/sickle-cell/): AA, AS, SS genotype compatibility checker and inheritance probability calculator.
- [Traditional vs Western Medicine Cost](https://afrotools.com/tools/traditional-vs-western/): A culturally respectful comparison of traditional and Western medicine costs for common conditions like malaria, hypertension, and diabetes in Africa.
- [Tuberculosis Treatment Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/tb-tracker/): TB treatment duration tracker and cost estimator for 15 African countries. Includes DOT (Directly Observed Therapy) schedule and side effect monitoring.
- [Waist-Hip Ratio Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/waist-hip-ratio/): Cardiovascular risk assessment using waist-hip ratio. African body standard ranges.
- [Water Intake Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/water-intake/): Daily water needs by weight, activity, African climate conditions and health goals.

- [Tenancy Deposit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tenancy-deposit/): Legal deposit limits and rent advance rules per country.

- [TIN Registration Guide — Tax Identification Numbers Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/tin-guide/): TIN registration guide for 16 African countries. Tax identification number authorities, processes, costs, timelines, and required documents for businesses and individuals.
- [Trademark Registration Guide — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/trademark-registration/): Trademark registration guide for 16 African countries. Authorities, costs, timelines, ARIPO and OAPI regional bodies, Nice Classification, and registration process.
- [Will / Testament Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/will-generator/): Create a basic Will or Living Will for African jurisdictions. Succession law guidance for Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana.

- [Islamic Finance Profit Rate Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/islamic-finance/): Compare Murabaha markup, Ijarah lease payments and Musharakah equity contribution for halal financing planning.
- [Islamic Inheritance Faraid Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/faraid-inheritance/): Model common Faraid inheritance shares for spouse, parents, sons and daughters with estate deductions and scholar review notes.
- [Lobola Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/lobola-calculator/): Estimate a respectful family budget for cash, livestock, gifts, and ceremony costs.
- [Lobola Gift List](https://afrotools.com/tools/lobola-gift-list/): Build a respectful family gift and ceremony item list with values, owners, status, and copyable notes.
- [Lobola Negotiation Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/lobola-negotiation-checklist/): Prepare a respectful family meeting brief with roles, pending questions, gifts, timing, and follow-up notes.
- [Naming Ceremony Budget Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/naming-ceremony/): Plan aqiqah, Yoruba, Igbo, Akan or church naming ceremony costs with food, gifts, officiant and family logistics.
- [Prayer Times and Qibla Planner](https://afrotools.com/tools/prayer-times/): Plan daily salah times with African city presets, prayer method adjustments, Asr school choice and Qibla bearing.
- [Ramadan Timetable Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ramadan-timetable/): Generate a Ramadan planning timetable with suhoor, iftar, taraweeh, last ten nights and Eid preparation markers.
- [Tithe & Offering Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/tithe-calculator/): 10% tithe, first fruits, and offering calculator. Multi-currency.
- [Traditional Attire Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/traditional-attire/): Budget agbada, kente, kitenge, kaftan and ceremonial outfits with fabric, tailoring and accessory lines.
- [Traditional Calendar Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/traditional-calendar/): Convert dates into traditional planning references such as Igbo market days, Ethiopian date estimate and cultural event notes.
- [Zakat Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/zakat-calculator/): Calculate zakat on cash, gold, silver, business inventory, receivables and liabilities with gold or silver nisab planning.

- [AfCFTA Tariff Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/afcfta-tracker/): Live AfCFTA duty schedule. Check duty-free status for any item between 54 African countries. Phase I & II schedules.

- [Bill of Lading Template](https://afrotools.com/tools/bol-generator/): Generate draft Bill of Lading templates for reference. Understand B/L types (original, seawaybill, combined). Educational tool for African importers and exporters.
- [Certificate of Origin Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/coo-generator/): Generate and check AfCFTA, ECOWAS, EAC, SADC and COMESA Certificates of Origin with origin criteria checker.
- [Commodity Trade Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/commodity-tracker/): Top imports and exports for 8 African economies. Trade balance, commodity price reference, trading partner data.
- [Cross-Border Data Transfer Checklist — Africa 2024](https://afrotools.com/tools/cross-border-data/): Before transferring personal data outside an African country, check the requirements. Covers adequacy frameworks, SCCs, BCRs, consent mechanisms, and prohibited destinations for 16 African countries.
- [Customs Clearance Time Estimator Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/customs-time/): How long does customs clearance take in Africa? Get time estimates, required documents checklist, agent fees, and storage cost calculators for Nigerian, Kenyan, South African ports and more.
- [EAC Common External Tariff](https://afrotools.com/tools/eac-cet/): Look up EAC Common External Tariff (CET) rates for Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi, South Sudan, DR Congo. Sensitive items, duty remission, country comparison.
- [ECOWAS Trade Levy Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ecowas-levy/): Calculate ECOWAS Common External Tariff (CET) and associated levies. 5-band duty, Community Levy, country supplements for NG, GH, CI, SN. ETLS eligibility checker.
- [Export Documentation Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/export-docs/): Country-specific checklist for every document needed to export from Africa. 17 origin countries, 8 destinations including EU, US, China, AfCFTA.
- [FX Import Cost Impact](https://afrotools.com/tools/fx-import-impact/): Calculate how currency depreciation affects import costs. Model FX scenarios for 15 African currencies.
- [HS Code Lookup](https://afrotools.com/tools/hs-code-lookup/): Search HS codes and customs duty rates for supported African countries. Import duty rates by item name or HS code. Free duty lookup.
- [Incoterms 2020 Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/incoterms-calculator/): All 11 Incoterms 2020 explained with cost-split calculator, comparison tool, and Africa-specific trade guide.
- [Landed Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/landed-cost/): Estimate landed cost for selected African import markets with source-confidence labels for user inputs, estimates, and values needing verification.
- [LC Fee Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/lc-calculator/): Calculate Letter of Credit opening, confirmation and amendment fees. 15 countries, 9 LC types.
- [Packing List Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/packing-list/): Generate professional packing lists for international shipping. Auto-calculate CBM, container utilization, and volumetric weights. Download as PDF.
- [Port Demurrage Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/demurrage-calculator/): Calculate port demurrage and storage charges at 16 African ports. Tiered daily rates, additional charges, 30-day projection.
- [Proforma Invoice Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/proforma-invoice/): Generate professional proforma invoices for international trade. HS codes, Incoterms, FOB/CIF pricing. Required for LC opening and import permits.
- [SADC Rules of Origin Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/sadc-roo/): Check if your item qualifies for SADC preferential tariffs. 16 member states, 11 item-specific rules, value-added calculator, COO guide.
- [Shipping Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/shipping-estimator/): Estimate sea freight, air freight and road haulage costs for Africa trade corridors. 16 ports, 8 airlines, 8 trucking routes.
- [Shipping Weight / Volumetric Weight Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/shipping-weight/): Calculate volumetric weight vs actual weight for African shipping. Find chargeable weight for DHL, FedEx, and African couriers. Understand dimensional weight pricing.
- [Trade Finance Cost Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/trade-finance-comparator/): Compare 6 trade finance instruments — LC Sight, Usance, T/T, CAD, Open Account, SBLC. Smart advisor, cost calculator, Africa guide.

- [Truck Load Optimizer Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/truck-load/): Maximize payload efficiency for African freight. Calculate load weight vs capacity, cost per tonne-km, and whether consolidation makes financial sense.
- [Vehicle Depreciation Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/vehicle-depreciation/): Calculate car depreciation for African markets. Annual value loss, suggested times to sell, resale value by make and age.
- [Vehicle Import Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/vehicle-registration/): detailed vehicle registration and import documentation checklist for 12 African countries. NTSA, DVLA, FRSC requirements.
- [Vehicle Operating Cost Calculator Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/vehicle-operating-cost/): Calculate the true total annual cost of owning and running a vehicle in Africa — fuel, insurance, maintenance, registration, depreciation, parking and tolls.
- [Vehicle Tracker ROI Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/vehicle-tracker-roi/): Calculate vehicle tracker ROI in Africa. Insurance discount 15–25%, fuel savings 10–15%, theft prevention value. Payback period calculator for Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa.
