- [African Beach Holiday Budget Planner — Zanzibar, Seychelles, Diani](https://afrotools.com/tools/beach-holiday-budget/): Plan your African beach holiday budget. Zanzibar, Diani, Seychelles, Mauritius, Cape Town, Lagos, Mombasa, Sharm el-Sheikh. Per-person cost breakdown with accommodation, food, and activities.
- [African Festival & Event Travel Budget Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/festival-travel-budget/): Plan your festival travel budget. AFCON, Carnival Calabar, Felabration, Timkat Ethiopia, Sauti za Busara Zanzibar, CHALE WOTE Ghana. All-in cost with flights, hotels, tickets.
- [African Safari Cost Calculator — Budget to Luxury](https://afrotools.com/tools/safari-cost/): Calculate your African safari cost. Kenya, Tanzania, South Africa, Rwanda gorilla trekking, Uganda. Budget camping to luxury tented camps. Peak vs low season pricing.
- [Airbnb vs Hotel Comparator Africa — Lagos, Nairobi, Cape Town](https://afrotools.com/tools/airbnb-vs-hotel/): Compare Airbnb vs hotel costs in African cities. Lagos, Nairobi, Accra, Cape Town, Kigali. Group size sweet spots, long stay monthly rates, cooking savings analysis.
- [Airport Transfer Cost Comparator — Lagos, Nairobi, Accra, Johannesburg](https://afrotools.com/tools/airport-transfer/): Compare airport transfer costs in Africa. Taxi vs Uber vs shuttle vs private car. Lagos MMIA, Nairobi JKIA, Johannesburg OR Tambo, Accra KIA, Cairo International. Group pricing.
- [Hotel Star Rating Price Guide Africa — Lagos, Nairobi, Accra](https://afrotools.com/tools/hotel-star-guide/): Hotel nightly rate guide for African cities. 1–5 star prices in Lagos, Nairobi, Accra, Cairo, Johannesburg, Addis Ababa, Dakar. Season pricing, booking tips, best neighborhoods.
- [Travel Packing List Generator for Africa — Safari, Beach, Business](https://afrotools.com/tools/travel-packing-list/): Generate a customized Africa travel packing list. Safari, beach, business, adventure, backpacker. Tropical, desert, mountain, coastal climates. African airline baggage tips.
- [Travel Vaccination Cost & Schedule for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/travel-vaccination-cost/): Check required and recommended travel vaccinations for African destinations. Yellow fever, typhoid, hepatitis A/B, malaria prophylaxis, meningitis. Cost by country with timeline.

## Uniquely African

- [African Cost of Living Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/cost-of-living/): Compare living costs across 54 African capitals. Basket of goods approach.
- [African Diaspora Tax Guide](https://afrotools.com/tools/diaspora-guide/): Tax obligations for Africans living in UK, USA, Canada, UAE. Double taxation treaties.
- [African Market Day Calendar](https://afrotools.com/tools/market-days/): Eke, Orie, Afor, Nkwo cycle tracker and weekly market day finder for Nigerian markets.
- [AfroAtlas — Africa Resource Explorer](https://afrotools.com/tools/afroatlas/): Interactive explorer for African country profiles, GDP, natural resources, trade data, rankings, and side-by-side comparisons. Includes Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Egypt, Ethiopia, Ghana, and more.
- [AfroConflict — Conflict Intelligence](https://afrotools.com/tools/africa-conflict/): Africa conflict intelligence dashboard — active conflicts, displacement tracker, economic impact, actor networks, scenario forecasts. ACLED + UNHCR + World Bank data.
- [AfroKitchen — African Recipes](https://afrotools.com/tools/afrokitchen/): Recipe atlas with country hubs, filters, serving scaling, weekly plans, shopping lists, and reviewed submissions.
- [AfroPoints — Earn Money Contributing Data](https://afrotools.com/tools/afropoints/): Earn real money by sharing African market data — prices, rates, salaries, costs. Contribute, earn points, cash out via mobile money.
- [AfroPrices — Compare Prices Across Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/afroprices/): Find prices for phones, electronics, appliances, and everyday goods across African e-commerce platforms and local markets.
- [Ajo / Chama / Tontine Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ajo-chama/): Plan rotating savings (Ajo, Chama, Tontine, Stokvel). Contribution schedules, payout tracking, member management, printable rotation tables.
- [Ajo / Esusu Interest Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/ajo-interest/): Calculate returns on rotating savings groups. Optimal Ajo contribution amounts.
- [Ajo/Chama Savings Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/ajo-tracker/): Track rotating savings groups. Members, contributions, payout calendar, payment tracking. Ajo, Esusu, Chama, Stokvel, Tontine.
- [Amount to Words (Ghana)](https://afrotools.com/tools/amount-words-gh/): Convert Ghana Cedi amounts to words for cheques.
- [Amount to Words (Kenya)](https://afrotools.com/tools/amount-words-ke/): Convert Kenya Shilling amounts to words for cheques and legal docs.
- [Amount to Words (Naira)](https://afrotools.com/tools/naira-to-words/): Convert Naira amounts to words for cheques and documents.
- [Ankara / Kente Pattern Cost Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/ankara-kente-cost/): Calculate cost for Invoice, Kente, Kanga, Kitenge, Adinkra, Aso-Oke fabric by the yard. Export value estimates, quality tiers, customs duty guide.
- [Bride Price Advisor](https://afrotools.com/tools/brideprice-advisor/): Igba nkwu, Lobola, Bridewealth guidance for 20+ ethnic groups across Africa.
- [Electricity Bill Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/electricity-estimator/): Prepaid meter units calculator per country. Tariff bands and usage estimator.
- [Fabric & Material Cost Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/fabric-cost/): Calculate total fabric cost for Invoice, lace, velvet, chiffon, and more. Includes wastage, notions, and bulk discount analysis. African currency support.
- [Film/TV Budget Estimator Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/nollywood-pitch/): Budget film and TV productions — Nollywood, Afrobeats video, Ghollywood cost builder.
- [Fintech Fee Watch](https://afrotools.com/tools/fintech-fee-watch/): Track ATM, transfer, cash-out, POS, and USSD fees across African fintechs and banks with moderated contributor reports.
- [Fuel Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/fuel-cost/): Route fuel cost estimator with African city routes and live fuel prices.
- [Funeral Cost Estimator](https://afrotools.com/tools/burial-cost/): Estimate burial costs in Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, SA. Local packages.
- [Informal FX Watch](https://afrotools.com/tools/informal-fx-watch/): Track street, BDC, and P2P informal FX spreads across African markets with contributor-backed quotes.
- [Informal Remittance Cost Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/hawala-tracker/): Compare hawala, Western Union, and bank wire costs for Horn of Africa.
- [Japa Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/japa-calculator/): Total relocation cost from Africa. 38 origins, 22 destinations, 73 visa pathways. Cost of living, quality of life, Visa Readiness Signal, community insights.
- [Land Size Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/land-size/): Nigerian plots, hectares, acres, perches. Country-specific land units.
- [Mobile Money Fee Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/mobile-money-fees/): Compare M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, OPay, Chipper fees instantly.
- [Okada / Boda Boda Income Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/okada-income/): Daily income, expenses, and profit tracker for motorcycle taxi riders across Africa.
- [Remittance Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/remittance-compare/): Compare Wise, WorldRemit, Western Union and 8 more. Find cheapest way to send money to Africa.
- [Remittance Comparator Pro](https://afrotools.com/tools/remittance-v2/): Compare editable remittance quotes by recipient value, FX margin, fee, speed, and payout method.
- [Staple Basket Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/staple-basket/): Track staple food prices by neighborhood and market, then benchmark basket inflation with AfroPoints submissions.
- [Susu Group Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/susu-tracker/): Manage susu/esusu/ajo groups. Track contributions, arrears, payouts.
- [WhatsApp Link Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/whatsapp-link/): Generate wa.me links with pre-filled messages. African business essential.
- [Wholesale Retail Spread](https://afrotools.com/tools/wholesale-retail-spread/): Measure wholesale-to-retail spreads for fast-moving goods by city, market, and item.

## VAT & Business Tax

- [African Business Ideas](https://afrotools.com/tools/idea-board/): Compare 11,000+ business ideas across Africa with startup costs, breakeven timelines, and practical feasibility notes.
- [Algeria VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/algeria/dz-vat): DGI TVA 19% standard, 9% reduced. Zero-rated exports. Multi-item invoice mode.
- [Angola VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/angola/ao-vat): AGT IVA 14% standard, 5% reduced, 2% basic goods. Zero-rated exports. Multi-item invoice.
- [Benin VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/benin/bj-vat): DGI TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: food, medical, education. Multi-item invoice mode.
- [Botswana VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/botswana/bw-vat): BURS VAT 14%. Zero-rated agricultural. Exempt: financial, medical, education. Multi-item invoice.
- [Break-Even Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/break-even/): Fixed costs, variable costs, selling price — find your break-even point.
- [Burkina Faso VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/burkina-faso/bf-vat): DGI TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: food, medical, education, agricultural inputs.
- [Burundi VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/burundi/bi-vat): OBR TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: medical, education, agricultural inputs.
- [Business Name Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-name-gen/): Generate business name ideas and check CAC, CIPC, or RBA availability before you register.
- [Business Plan Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-plan-builder/): Create a professional business plan for your African SME. Guided templates with financial projections, market analysis, and operations plan. PDF export.
- [Cameroon VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/cameroon/cm-vat): DGI TVA 19.25%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: food, medical, education. Multi-item invoice.
- [Cape Verde VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/cape-verde/cv-vat): DGCI IVA 15%, 6% reduced. Zero-rated exports & tourism. Multi-item invoice mode.
- [Central African Republic VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/car/cf-vat): DGID TVA 19%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: food, medical, education, agricultural inputs.
- [Chad VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/chad/td-vat): DGI TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: agricultural inputs, medical, education, basic food.
- [Comoros VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/comoros/km-vat): DGI TVA 10%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: medical, education, basic food, agricultural inputs.
- [Congo VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/congo/cg-vat): DGI TVA 18.9%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: agricultural inputs, medical, education.
- [Côte d'Ivoire VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/cote-divoire/ci-vat): DGI TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: food, medical, education, agricultural inputs.
- [Djibouti VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/djibouti/dj-vat): DGI TVA 10%. Zero-rated exports & port re-export. Exempt: basic food, medical, education.
- [DR Congo VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/dr-congo/cd-vat): DGI TVA 16%. Zero-rated exports & mining. Exempt: agricultural inputs, medical, food staples.
- [Egypt VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/egypt/eg-vat): ETA VAT 14%. Standard + reduced rates. Table tax.
- [Equatorial Guinea VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/eq-guinea/gq-vat): TVA 15%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: food staples, medical, education. Multi-item invoice.
- [Eswatini VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/eswatini/sz-vat): SRA VAT 15%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: medical, education, financial services, rentals.
- [Ethiopia VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/ethiopia/et-vat): ERCA VAT 15%, zero-rated, exempt. Reverse VAT + multi-item invoice mode.
- [Gabon VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/gabon/ga-vat): DGI TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: food staples, medical, agricultural inputs, education.
- [Gambia VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/gambia/gm-vat): GRA VAT 15%. Zero-rated exports & tourism. Exempt: basic food, medical, education.
- [Ghana VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/ghana/gh-vat): GRA VAT 15% + 2.5% NHIL + 2.5% GETFund. Standard effective charge and zero-rated supplies.
- [Guinea VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/guinea/gn-vat): DNI TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: food staples, medical, education, agricultural inputs.
- [Guinea-Bissau VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/guinea-bissau/gw-vat): DNRE TVA 17%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: basic food, medical, education.
- [Inventory Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/inventory/): Barcode scanning, low-stock alerts, SKU management. Freemium.
- [Kenya VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/kenya/ke-vat): KRA VAT 16%, zero-rated, exempt. Reverse VAT and inclusive/exclusive toggle.
- [Lesotho VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/lesotho/ls-vat): LRA VAT 15%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: medical, education, financial services, rentals.
- [Liberia GST Calculator](https://afrotools.com/liberia/lr-vat): LRA GST 10%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: agricultural inputs, medicines, education, food.
- [Madagascar VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/madagascar/mg-vat): DGI TVA 20%. Zero-rated exports & tourism. Exempt: basic food, agricultural inputs, medical.
- [Malawi VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/malawi/mw-vat): MRA VAT 17.5%. Zero-rated exports and selected reliefs. Check MRA notices for EIS and threshold rules.
- [Mali VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/mali/ml-vat): DGI TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: basic food, medical, education, agricultural inputs.
- [Market Stall Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/market-stall-profit/): Track daily market sales, stock costs, and profit margins for informal traders.
- [Markup & Selling Price Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/markup-calc/): Calculate selling price from cost and desired markup. Market trader essential.
- [Mauritania VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/mauritania/mr-vat): DGI TVA 16%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: basic food, medical, education, agricultural inputs.
- [Mauritius VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/mauritius/mu-vat): MRA VAT 15%. Zero-rated exports & tourist services. Exempt: financial, education, medical, rentals.
- [Morocco VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/morocco/ma-vat): DGI TVA 20%, 14%, 10%, 7% reduced rates. Zero-rated exports. Multi-item invoice mode.
- [Mozambique VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/mozambique/mz-vat): AT IVA 17%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: unprocessed food, medical, agricultural inputs, education.
- [Namibia VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/namibia/na-vat): NamRA VAT 15%. Zero-rated exports & diplomatic. Exempt: financial, education, medical, accommodation.
- [Niger VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/niger/ne-vat): DGI TVA 19%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: basic food, medical, education, agricultural inputs.
- [Nigeria VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/nigeria/ng-vat): NTA 2026 VAT: 7.5% standard, zero-rated, exempt categories. Reverse VAT included.
- [Paystack Fee Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/paystack-calculator/): Calculate exactly how much Paystack charges per transaction in Nigeria. Local card fees, international rates, net revenue after deductions.
- [Profit Margin Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/profit-margin/): Gross, operating, and net margin. Multi-currency with import duty.
- [Punguzo Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/discount-calc/): Calculate sale price, savings, and percentage off. Bulk pricing.
- [Rwanda VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/rwanda/rw-vat): RRA VAT 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: medical, education, food. Multi-item invoice mode.
- [São Tomé VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/sao-tome/st-vat): DNRE IVA 15%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: medical, education, basic food, agricultural inputs.
- [Senegal VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/senegal/sn-vat): DGID TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: unprocessed food, medical, agricultural inputs, education.
- [Seychelles VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/seychelles/sc-vat): SRC VAT 15%. Zero-rated exports & diplomatic. Exempt: medical, financial, education, rentals.
- [Shipping Cost Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/shipping-calc/): DHL, FedEx, EMS, local courier costs across African corridors.
- [Sierra Leone VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/sierra-leone/sl-vat): NRA VAT 15%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: agricultural inputs, medical, education, basic food.
- [South Africa VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/south-africa/za-vat): SARS VAT 15%, zero-rated, exempt. Inclusive/exclusive. Vendor registration threshold.
- [Sudan VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/sudan/sd-vat): SRTD VAT 17%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: basic food, medical, agricultural inputs, education.
- [Tanzania VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tanzania/tz-vat): TRA VAT 18%, zero-rated, exempt. Reverse VAT included.
- [Togo VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/togo/tg-vat): OTR TVA 18%. Zero-rated exports. Exempt: basic food, agricultural inputs, medical, education.
- [Tunisia VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tunisia/tn-vat): DGI TVA 19%, 13%, 7% reduced rates. Zero-rated exports. Multi-item invoice mode.
- [Uganda VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/uganda/ug-vat): URA VAT 18%. Zero-rated exports & water. Exempt: food, education, health. Multi-item invoice.
- [VAT Calculator (Pan-African)](https://afrotools.com/tools/vat-calculator/): All 50+ African countries. Add VAT, extract VAT, compare countries side-by-side. 2025/26 rates.
- [Zambia VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/zambia/zm-vat): ZRA VAT 16%. Zero-rated exports & tourist services. Exempt: maize flour, medical, education.
- [Zimbabwe VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/zimbabwe/zw-vat): ZIMRA VAT 15.5%. Zero-rated exports & tourism. Exempt: basic food, medical, agricultural inputs.
